first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are substantively identical. Both assign the same score (7/10) and center on the same core assessment: the candidate is a strong systems developer with relevant adjacent experience, but lacks direct, explicit experience building large-scale experimentation platforms. The minor differences in the phrasing of strengths and the specific secondary concerns raised are well within the scope of normal run-to-run variation and are not logically connected to the change in the university's location.
